subject: fix(security): wrap spatial_ref_sys RLS in DO block + update docs
body:
Wrap the ALTER TABLE + CREATE POLICY in a DO block with pg_tables
existence check so the migration is a complete no-op if PostGIS isn't
installed. Update HISTORY.md and SESSION_NOTES.md.

Tags: security, database, rls, postgis, documentation
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: security-hardening
Semver: patch
